## What this PR changes

- [ ] New PRD (`prds/active/`)
- [ ] Updated research note (`research/`)
- [ ] Updated knowledge-base (`knowledge-base/`)
- [ ] Sprint note (`notes/`)
- [ ] Tooling / workflow change (`.claude/`, `.github/`)
- [ ] Other: ___

## Checklist — PRDs only (skip for tooling changes)

- [ ] `doc-reviewer` was run and all **BLOCKER** findings are resolved
- [ ] YAML frontmatter is present (`status`, `feature`, `author`, `jira_epic`, `dependencies`)
- [ ] All `TODO: confirm` blockers are resolved or have a named owner + deadline
- [ ] Non-goals section explicitly lists out-of-scope items
- [ ] Success metrics are measurable with named instrumentation
- [ ] No cross-PRD conflicts (doc-reviewer checked `prds/active/`)

## Summary of changes
<!-- One sentence per file changed. -->
